name: risk_aversion_regime_swing_amplifier
description: 위험회피 regime shows 75.6% swing accuracy across 455 samples, outperforming 위험선호 at 69.7%
trigger: regime == 위험회피 AND swing signal triggered AND sample_count >= 100
action: apply +0.10 confidence multiplier to swing trade entry; extend hold window by 1 day
